title: schefflera kerchoveiana
intro: Schefflera kerchoveiana, also known as the Umbrella Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae native to the tropical forests of New Caledonia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. The health benefits of Schefflera kerchoveiana include its potential to prevent cancer, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Schefflera kerchoveiana can be prepared as a tea or decoction for herbal remedies, and its leaves are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
